name: datadog-spy
description: Hover over metrics calls to see live Datadog graphs from production

metricsPeek.datadogApiKey.description: Datadog API key for authenticating with the Datadog MCP server

metricsPeek.datadogAppKey.description: Datadog Application key for authenticating with the Datadog MCP server

metricsPeek.defaultTimeRange.description: Default time range for metric graphs

metricsPeek.metricPrefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to detected metric names (e.g., 'myapp.')

enumDescriptions: Official Datadog MCP Server (remote, via Streamable HTTP) — requires API key + App key
Official Datadog MCP Server (local binary) — requires datadog_mcp_cli installed and logged in
Community MCP Server (@winor30/mcp-server-datadog via npx) — requires API key + App key
metricsPeek.mcpServer.description: Which Datadog MCP server backend to use
